mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalDecisionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN decision_status = 'SELECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS selectedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN decision_status = 'CLARIFY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS clarifyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN decision_status = 'NO_CANDIDATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noCandidateCount, AVG(confidence) AS averageConfidence, AVG(duration_ms) AS averageDurationMs FROM ai_capability_route_log WHERE created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at < #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS reviewedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN correct_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewedCorrectCount, SUM(CASE WHEN correct_flag = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewedWrongCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN correct_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) END AS reviewedAccuracy FROM ai_capability_route_feedback WHERE feedback_status = 'APPROVED' AND reviewed_at >= #{startTime} AND reviewed_at < #{endTime}

SELECT original_capability_code AS originalCapabilityCode, expected_capability_code AS expectedCapabilityCode, COUNT(*) AS errorCount FROM ai_capability_route_feedback WHERE feedback_status = 'APPROVED' AND correct_flag = 0 AND reviewed_at >= #{startTime} AND reviewed_at < #{endTime} GROUP BY original_capability_code, expected_capability_code ORDER BY errorCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
